title: Forms of Equity Investment: A real estate investment trust (REIT) has a market capitalization...
summary: Calculate the debt-to-equity ratio and return on equity for a REIT from market and financial data.
prompt: A real estate investment trust (REIT) has a market capitalization of $500 million and total debt of $200 million. If the REIT has an annual revenue of $120 million, calculate the debt-to-equity ratio and the return on equity (ROE) if the net income is $40 million.
solution: Step 1: Calculate equity: Equity = Market Capitalization - Debt = $500 million - $200 million = $300 million. Step 2: Calculate debt-to-equity ratio: Debt-to-Equity Ratio = Total Debt / Total Equity = $200 million / $300 million = 0.67. Step 3: Calculate ROE: ROE = Net Income / Total Equity = $40 million / $300 million = 0.133 or 13.3%.
